RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PADILLA, RUBEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1045 MISSION STREET #8 CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CA 94103 $5,784.00 RENT, $3,025.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,809.00, LEASE FORFEITED, ; $5784 FOR THE PAST DUE AMOUNTS; ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $3025.00, FOR A TOTAL MONETARY AWARD OF $8809.00. SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT FOR UNLAWFUL DETAINER FOLLOWING DEFAULT UNDER THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT (CCP 664.6)

MINI MINUTES: Line 13
Judge Pro Tem: Richard Beckman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff 1045 Mission L.P., is present. Represented by Daniel Nguyen
Attorney Paul Arshawsky for the plaintiff.
Defendant Ruben Padilla are present.
Attorney Steve Andersen appearing for defendant in limited scope

The Judge Pro Tem , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of May 18, 2015 is vacated. (501/jpt)
